description: Calculate the total Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for each continent using the loaded 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer. Sum the 'GDP_MD_EST' field for each unique value in the 'CONTINENT' field and export the resulting summary to a CSV file at /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/continent_gdp_summary.csv. The output CSV must contain at least two columns: the continent name and the summed GDP value.

metadata.note: GDP values in the dataset are usually in millions of US dollars. Ranges are broad to accommodate dataset versions.
